title.en: Polypectomy of < 10 mm lesions including pedunculated (prerequisite)

description.en: Competence in cold-snare polypectomy of < 10 mm lesions and pedunculated polypectomy (including the use of electrosurgical energy) as a precondition for EMR training (Rec 1).

criteria.en: Documented cold-snare and pedunculated polypectomy competence per national / training-programme standard.
